title: The Path to Laugh Tale
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on the path to laugh tale within the Inside the Whale Tree storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: It all started way back when... the master whom we serve, Lord Oden Kouzuki...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: began taking an interest intense "stones", y'see...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: And that was because...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Ah... weren't we s'posed to stay quiet about this, inu?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I have no objection to it. We need not hide anything from these individuals!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You may speak as you see fit!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: What's all this "I have no objection" crap, huh?! Someone's gettin' awfully full of themselves again, don't you think, Hmm-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I am royalty so it cannot be helped, you insolent fool!

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: The truth of it is, the Kouzuki family lineage of the Wano Kingdom has, for genera- Tions...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: been a family of "stonemasons" who quarry for stones and manufacture them.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: Even now, they're technological prowess is quite somethin', if I do say so myself!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: "Stone- Masons" ?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Right y'are. 800 years ago, in the distant past...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: The very same Kouzuki clan, with their incompatible skills, constructed indestructible "Books"!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: Those "books" are none other than the poneglyphs!

dialogue.speaker: Robin
dialogue.text: The poneglypHS, which are scattered throughout the world... they were all constructed by a single clan?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Those stones that Robin's been searching for?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You made 'em?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: 'Twas not me who carved them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Rather, it was my ancient ancestors from FaaAR in the past, that it was!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: In that case, do you guys know what's written on 'em?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: That knowledge was never passed on to future generations!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: The contents of the stones can only be made known by reading them!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: However, what was passed on was the means to read and write the ancient glyphs.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: However, that too... led to mis- fortune.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Prior to this skill being handed down to Momo- suke...

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: The imparting of the knowledge ceased to be during his father, "Oden Kouzuki's", generation...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: "ceased to be"...?! that can only mean...!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Momo- Nosuke's father was...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Yes... LORD open was...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Wano...! WA...!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Hrgh-!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: He was... boiled... boiled into a piping hot open* soup!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: UUGH...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hey! It's alright! No one's forcing you if you don't want to talk about it then...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: Lord Oden was... our master was... executed!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: by the hands of the "Shougun" of the nano kingdom and the pirate Kaido!

summary: The Path to Laugh Tale: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
